rationale: Reuses already-built DetailedUsageCallback/TokenUsage pipeline, matches v21's forward-compat intent, spike-proven under concurrency; Option B's BETWEEN join is unscoped (loop_runs has no session_id) and misattributes tokens under ll-parallel/ll-sprint concurrency
rule: Option A - richer on_usage_detailed callback wired at _run_action/_run_baseline_arm for a true per-invocation live writer
alternatives_rejected: Option B: time-range/BETWEEN UPDATE at _finish() scoped by [started_at, ended_at] window
